verbGlossary.DERIVED FROM: {source}'s baseline amount originates from {target} estimate attribute (e.g., project budget derived from estimated value)
verbGlossary.ALLOCATES TO: {source} distributes funds to {target} cost category (e.g., project budget allocates to hard cost)
verbGlossary.ESTABLISHES: {source} sets the definitive classification for {target} attribute (e.g., budget total establishes the value band)
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} or metric is broken down by {target} attribute for comparative benchmarking
verbGlossary.SUMMED INTO: {source} line items aggregate to determine {target} value band classification
verbGlossary.CALCULATED INTO: {source} cost items are divided by area to produce {target} attribute
verbGlossary.STANDARDIZED BY: {source} coding structure follows conventions appropriate to {target} type
verbGlossary.FUNDS: {source} reserve provides monetary backing for {target} contingency attribute
verbGlossary.DRAWN FROM: {source} burn rate or modification depletes {target} contingency attribute
verbGlossary.COMMITTED AGAINST: {source} commitment is recorded against {target} contract value attribute
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTED ACROSS: {source} value is spread across multiple subcontractors reflected in {target} attribute count
verbGlossary.PROCURED FOR: {source} is issued to fulfill {target} scope attribute
verbGlossary.CONTRIBUTES TO: {source} change event adds cost that increases {target} growth metric
verbGlossary.COUNTED TOWARD: {source} change order is tallied in {target} change order rate metric
verbGlossary.ALLOCATED INTO: {source} cost is distributed into {target} unit cost attribute
verbGlossary.ADJUSTS: Owner change order modifies {target} contract value attribute up or down
verbGlossary.TRACKED FOR: {source} is recorded specifically because {target} attribute requires cost segregation
verbGlossary.PROJECTS TOWARD: {source} forecast estimates the final value of {target} cost attribute
verbGlossary.RECALIBRATED BY: Forecast is re-evaluated when project conditions shift {target}
verbGlossary.BILLED AT: {source} amount reflects {target} completion percentage at time of billing
verbGlossary.BILLED AGAINST: Subcontractor invoice draws against {target} contract value attribute
verbGlossary.WITHHELD FROM: {source} is held back from {target} contract value attribute
verbGlossary.RELEASED AT: {source}is disbursed at the milestone defined by {target} completion attribute
verbGlossary.STRUCTURED WITHIN: {source} is organized as a breakdown of {target} contract value
verbGlossary.RESERVED WITHIN: {source} is set aside within {target} contingency budget attribute
verbGlossary.DRIVES: {source} variance metric causes movement in {target} performance attribute
verbGlossary.SIGNALS: {source} variance provides an early indicator of {target} status attribute's trajectory
verbGlossary.FORECASTS: {source} estimate at completion variance predicts deviation from {target} attribute
verbGlossary.DRIVEN BY: {source} metric is substantially influenced by {target} attribute value
verbGlossary.REQUIRES: {source} process demands timely {target} -- delays in processing {source} cascade into schedule and cost impacts
verbGlossary.RECOVERS: {source} financial instrument restores {target} by passing cost impacts through to the party contractually responsible
verbGlossary.WARNS: {source} trend metric provides early warning that {target} is at risk before the full financial impact materializes
verbGlossary.STRESSES: {source} financial mechanism creates cash flow pressure on {target} by holding back funds that affect working capital
